question: The line chart shows sales trends from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the challenge in interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is difficult to see precise changes and identify specific turning points in the trend.
options.B: Sales clearly declined from 1970 to 1980 before rising again.
options.C: Sales clearly declined from 1960 to 1970 before rising again.
options.D: Sales increased at a perfectly constant rate over the entire period.

explanation: The data shows a decline from 1960 to 1970, then a rise. Small text size can make it difficult to identify which decade had the decline.
